briefdescription.para: CAN peripheral configured, not yet started.
Bus active, no errors.
TEC > 0 — transmit errors accumulating.
CAN controller halted — bus-off condition.
CAN bus health states. Reported to STM32Board via onStatusChange().
Fired when CAN bus status changes. Register via onStatusChange().

memberdef.type: void(*)(uint32_t canId, const uint8_t *data, uint8_t len)
memberdef.definition: using CanRxCallback = void(*)(uint32_t canId, const uint8_t* data, uint8_t len)
memberdef.name: CanRxCallback

briefdescription.para: Fired when a CAN frame is received. Register via onReceive().
Fired when SYNC_REQ is received. Register via onSyncReq().
Broadcast ControlPacketPair to all panels.
RTT throughput test.
Request all nodes to re-poll inputs.
DCS-BIOS range start.
DCS-BIOS range end.
Frame sync byte.
Round-trip time measurement frame.
Sub-node heartbeat frame.
CAN error counter frame.
Sub-node input event forwarded upstream.
Primary input/output routing packet. 4 bytes; two are batched for CTRL_BCAST/EVT_n.

detaileddescription.para: 8-byte payload carried by HB_n heartbeat frames.
Two ControlPackets packed into one 8-byte input/output CAN frame.
Used by CTRL_BCAST and EVT_n only. Slot B controlId == 0x0000 signals an empty/padding slot.
Sent every 500 ms by PanelGroup nodes. PanelBridge reads HB_1–HB_63 to track PanelGroup health and populate diagnostics. HB_0 is reserved but not transmitted.

inbodydescription.para: < Payload routing key; not a CAN arbitration ID
< Payload — interpretation depends on controlId range
< Node ID — redundant with CAN ID, aids logging
< Seconds since boot, little-endian (wraps at ~18 h)

briefdescription.para: Heartbeat frame ID for node n. Range 0x100-0x13F; n=0 is PanelBridge.
Input event frame ID for node n. Range 0x201-0x23F.
TEST_SEQ echo frame ID for node n. Range 0x301-0x33F.
Boot-complete READY frame ID for node n. Range 0x401-0x43F.
Shared CAN bus types, frame IDs, and runtime API for OpenSkyhawk STM32 nodes.

detaileddescription.para: Owns all CAN bus interaction for PanelGroup and PanelBridge nodes. Types and constants (ControlPacket, CanStatus, frame IDs, CAN ID functions) are platform-agnostic. The runtime namespace (filters, lifecycle, send, callbacks, diagnostics) is STM32-only and guarded by ARDUINO_ARCH_STM32. CAN arbitration IDs (CAN_ID_*, canId*()) and payload ControlPacket::controlId values are separate namespaces; equal numeric values do not conflict because they occupy different CAN frame fields.
Dependency: STM32Board::begin() must be called before CANProtocol::start(). CANProtocol owns CAN bus operation; STM32Board owns peripheral hardware init.
